hooks.command: command -v aweek >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[aweek plugin] Installing aweek CLI via npm…' >&2; npm install -g aweek 2>&1 || { echo >&2; echo '[aweek plugin] Automatic install failed. The /aweek:* commands need the "aweek" binary on PATH.' >&2; echo '[aweek plugin] Install it manually with: npm install -g aweek' >&2; echo '[aweek plugin] Or, for the source you are looking at: cd <aweek-repo> && pnpm install && pnpm link --global' >&2; }; }
